HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering
 
Loading...
Searching...
No Matches
GreenFHom3D.cpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1
5
6#include "GreenFHom3D.h"
7#include <iostream>
8#include <tuple>
9#include "quadrature.h"
10
11// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
12// Construction
13// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
14GreenFHom3D::GreenFHom3D(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps) : GreenF(wvl, eps) {}
15
16GreenFHom3D::GreenFHom3D(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps, dcmplx mu)
17 : GreenF(wvl, eps, mu) {}
18
19GreenFHom3D::GreenFHom3D() : GreenF(dcmplx(0, 0), dcmplx(0, 0)) {}
20
21// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
22// Proximity tests (heuristics to pick smoothed vs. raw kernels)
23// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
28bool GreenFHom3D::AboveThreshold(rvec r, rvec rp) {
29 return norm(k_B) * dot(r - rp, r - rp) > 0.4;
30}
31
36bool GreenFHom3D::AboveThreshold(Triangle* T, Triangle* Tp) {
37 double d = sqrt(dot(T->Center() - Tp->Center(), T->Center() - Tp->Center()));
38 double psum = T->Perimeter() + Tp->Perimeter();
39 return d > psum / 2.;
40}
41
42// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
43// Pointwise kernels
44// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
45// Scalar Green's function G(r,r').
46dcmplx GreenFHom3D::Evaluate(rvec r, rvec rp) {
47 rvec dif(r - rp);
48 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
49 return exp(I * k_B * dis) / (4. * PI * dis);
50}
51
52// Dyadic Green's function \f$\overline{\overline G}(r,r')\f$.
53cdyad GreenFHom3D::EvaluateDyadic(rvec r, rvec rp) {
54 double dx(r(0) - rp(0));
55 double dy(r(1) - rp(1));
56 double dz(r(2) - rp(2));
57 double rr(sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz));
58 dcmplx ff((I * k_B * rr - 1.) / (k_B * k_B * rr * rr));
59 dcmplx nf((3. - 3. * I * k_B * rr - k_B * k_B * rr * rr) /
60 (k_B * k_B * rr * rr * rr * rr));
61 return cdyad(cvec(1. + ff + nf * dx * dx, nf * dx * dy, nf * dx * dz),
62 cvec(nf * dy * dx, 1. + ff + nf * dy * dy, nf * dy * dz),
63 cvec(nf * dz * dx, nf * dz * dy, 1. + ff + nf * dz * dz)) *
64 exp(I * k_B * rr) / (4. * PI * rr);
65}
66
73dcmplx GreenFHom3D::Smoothed(rvec r, rvec rp) {
74 rvec dif(r - rp);
75 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
76 dcmplx out(I * k_B / (4. * PI));
77 dcmplx id(1., 0.);
78 if (dis != 0.)
79 out = 1. / (4. * PI) *
80 ((exp(I * k_B * dis) - id) / dis + k_B * k_B * dis / 2.);
81 return out;
82}
83
89dcmplx GreenFHom3D::halfSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp) {
90 rvec dif(r - rp);
91 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
92 dcmplx out(I * k_B / (4. * PI));
93 dcmplx id(1., 0.);
94 if (dis != 0.) out = 1. / (4. * PI) * ((exp(I * k_B * dis) - id) / dis);
95 return out;
96}
97
101cvec GreenFHom3D::Gradient(rvec r, rvec rp) {
102 rvec dif(r - rp);
103 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
104 cvec out(-exp(I * k_B * dis) / (4. * PI * dis * dis) * (-1. / dis + I * k_B) *
105 dif);
106 return out;
107}
108
112std::tuple<dcmplx, cvec, cdyad> GreenFHom3D::EvaluateAll(rvec r, rvec rp) {
113 rvec dif(r - rp);
114 double dx(dif(0));
115 double dy(dif(1));
116 double dz(dif(2));
117 double rr(sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz));
118 dcmplx t1(exp(I * k_B * rr) / (4. * PI * rr));
119 dcmplx t2((I * k_B * rr - 1.) / (rr * rr));
120 dcmplx t3((3. - 3. * I * k_B * rr - k_B * k_B * rr * rr) /
121 (rr * rr * rr * rr));
122 std::tuple<dcmplx, cvec, cdyad> ret;
123 std::get<0>(ret) = t1;
124 std::get<1>(ret) = -t1 * t2 * dif;
125 std::get<2>(ret) =
126 cdyad(cvec(t2 + t3 * dx * dx, t3 * dx * dy, t3 * dx * dz),
127 cvec(t3 * dy * dx, t2 + t3 * dy * dy, t3 * dy * dz),
128 cvec(t3 * dz * dx, t3 * dz * dy, t2 + t3 * dz * dz)) *
129 t1;
130 return ret;
131}
132
133// Smoothed gradient kernel.
134cvec GreenFHom3D::GradientSmoothed(rvec r, rvec rp) {
135 rvec dif(r - rp);
136 double dis(sqrt(dot(dif, dif)));
137 cvec out(0., 0., 0.);
138 dcmplx id(1., 0.);
139 if (dis != 0)
140 out = -dif / (4. * PI * dis) *
141 ((-exp(I * k_B * dis) + id) / (dis * dis) +
142 I * k_B * exp(I * k_B * dis) / dis + k_B * k_B / 2.);
143 return out;
144}
145
146// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
147// Triangle and post‑processing integrals
148// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
149dcmplx GreenFHom3D::IntegrateD(RWGFun* /*f*/, RWGFun* /*fp*/) { exit(1); }
150dcmplx GreenFHom3D::IntegrateK(RWGFun* /*f*/, RWGFun* /*fp*/) { exit(1); }
151
157cvec GreenFHom3D::IntegrateDelta(rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
158 cvec out(0., 0., 0.);
159 Triangle* Tp = fp->TrianglePtr();
160 rvec rp[3];
161 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
162 rp[i] = Tp->Node(i);
163 }
164 double Ap = Tp->Area(), perimp = Tp->Perimeter();
165 rvec Tc(Tp->Center());
166 double dist = sqrt(dot(r - Tc, r - Tc));
167 double kr = sqrt(norm(k_B)) * dist;
168
169 int Ndunavant;
170 double(*xdunavant)[3], *wdunavant;
171 if (NeedsAccurate) {
172 Ndunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
173 xdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
174 wdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
175 } else {
176 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
177 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
178 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
179 }
180
181 bool NeedsSingSub = (dist < perimp) || (kr < 0.2 * PI);
182 dcmplx (GreenFHom3D::*Dfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp) =
183 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3D::Smoothed : &GreenFHom3D::Evaluate;
184 cvec (GreenFHom3D::*Kfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp) =
185 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3D::GradientSmoothed : &GreenFHom3D::Gradient;
186
187 dcmplx Dtemp;
188 cvec Ktemp;
189 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
190 rvec sp = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
191 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
192 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[i];
193 Dtemp = dAp * (this->*Dfunction)(r, sp);
194 Ktemp = dAp * (this->*Kfunction)(r, sp);
195 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(sp));
196 out += (fpsp * Dtemp - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() * Ktemp);
197 }
198
199 if (NeedsSingSub) {
200 SingSub ss;
201 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fp, r);
202 out += 1. / (4. * PI) * (-1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() *
203 (ss.K3(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K3(1)) +
204 (ss.K2(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K2(1)));
205 }
206
207 return out;
208}
209
215cvec GreenFHom3D::IntegrateKappa(rvec r, RWGFun* fp) {
216 cvec out(0., 0., 0.);
217 Triangle* Tp = fp->TrianglePtr();
218 rvec rp[3];
219 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
220 rp[i] = Tp->Node(i);
221 }
222 double Ap = Tp->Area(), perimp = Tp->Perimeter();
223 rvec Tc(Tp->Center());
224 double dist = sqrt(dot(r - Tc, r - Tc));
225 double kr = sqrt(norm(k_B)) * dist;
226
227 int Ndunavant;
228 double(*xdunavant)[3], *wdunavant;
229 if (NeedsAccurate) {
230 Ndunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
231 xdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
232 wdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
233 } else {
234 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
235 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
236 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
237 }
238
239 bool NeedsSingSub = (dist < perimp) || (kr < 0.2 * PI);
240 cvec (GreenFHom3D::*Kfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp) =
241 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3D::GradientSmoothed : &GreenFHom3D::Gradient;
242
243 dcmplx Dtemp;
244 cvec Ktemp;
245 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
246 rvec sp = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
247 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
248 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[i];
249 Ktemp = dAp * (this->*Kfunction)(r, sp);
250 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(sp));
251 out += cross(Ktemp, (cvec)fpsp);
252 }
253
254 if (NeedsSingSub) {
255 // Singularity subtraction for analytical integration on mesh triangles
256 SingSub ss;
257 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fp, r);
258 out += 1. / (4. * PI) * (ss.K4(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
259 }
260
261 return out;
262}
263
264// -----------------------------
265// Pair utilities (matrix symmetry helpers)
266// -----------------------------
267// D-pair (symmetric for this homogeneous case).
268std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> GreenFHom3D::PairD(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) {
269 // Don't care about symmetry, this is more exact!
270 dcmplx elem(IntegrateD(f, fp));
271 if (f == fp) return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem);
272 dcmplx elem2(IntegrateD(fp, f));
273 return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem2);
274}
275
276// K-pair (in general non-symmetric).
277std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx> GreenFHom3D::PairK(RWGFun* f, RWGFun* fp) {
278 // Unfortunately, IntegrateK is not symmetric.
279 dcmplx elem(IntegrateK(f, fp));
280 if (f == fp) return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem);
281 dcmplx elem2(IntegrateK(fp, f));
282 return std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>(elem, elem2);
283}
284
285// -----------------------------
286// Assembly helpers
287// -----------------------------
293void GreenFHom3D::SameTriDK(
294 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
295 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK) {
296 Triangle *tPtr = fvec[0]->TrianglePtr(), *tpPtr = fpvec[0]->TrianglePtr();
297 rvec r[3], rp[3];
298 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
299 r[i] = tPtr->Node(i);
300 rp[i] = tpPtr->Node(i);
301 }
302 double A = tPtr->Area(), Ap = tpPtr->Area();
303 int tristatus = tPtr->FindAdjacency(tpPtr);
304 // Singularity subtraction for analytical integration on mesh triangles
305 SingSub ss;
306
307 int Ndunavant;
308 double(*xdunavant)[3];
309 double* wdunavant;
310 bool NeedsDanalytic(false);
311 bool NeedsKIntegral(tristatus != 3);
312 bool NeedsKLineIntegral(false);
313 bool NeedsSingSub;
314 cvec (GreenFHom3D::*Kfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp);
315 dcmplx (GreenFHom3D::*Dfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp);
316 if (NeedsAccurate) {
317 Ndunavant = tristatus > 0 ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
318 xdunavant = tristatus > 0 ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
319 wdunavant = tristatus > 0 ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
320 NeedsDanalytic = tristatus == 3;
321 NeedsKLineIntegral = tristatus == 2;
322 bool DistantAboveThreshold = tristatus == 0 and AboveThreshold(tPtr, tpPtr);
323 NeedsSingSub = !(tristatus == 3 or DistantAboveThreshold);
324 if (tristatus == 3) {
325 Dfunction = &GreenFHom3D::halfSmoothed;
326 } else if (!DistantAboveThreshold) {
327 Dfunction = &GreenFHom3D::Smoothed;
328 } else {
329 Dfunction = &GreenFHom3D::Evaluate;
330 }
331 Kfunction = DistantAboveThreshold ? &GreenFHom3D::Gradient
332 : &GreenFHom3D::GradientSmoothed;
333 } else {
334 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
335 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
336 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
337 NeedsSingSub = !AboveThreshold(tPtr->Center(), tpPtr->Center());
338 Kfunction =
339 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3D::GradientSmoothed : &GreenFHom3D::Gradient;
340 Dfunction = NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3D::Smoothed : &GreenFHom3D::Evaluate;
341 }
342
343 std::vector<rvec> svec(Ndunavant), spvec(Ndunavant);
344 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
345 svec[i] = r[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + r[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
346 r[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
347 spvec[i] = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
348 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
349 }
350
351 dcmplx Dtemp;
352 cvec Ktemp;
353 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
354 double dA = A * wdunavant[i];
355 for (int j = 0; j < Ndunavant; ++j) {
356 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[j];
357 Dtemp = dA * dAp * (this->*Dfunction)(svec[i], spvec[j]);
358 if (NeedsKIntegral) {
359 Ktemp = dA * dAp * (this->*Kfunction)(svec[i], spvec[j]);
360 }
361 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
362 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
363 rvec fs(f->Evaluate(svec[i]));
364 double divf(f->RWGPreFactor());
365 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
366 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
367 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(spvec[j]));
368 double divfp(fp->RWGPreFactor());
369
370 DK[k][l].first +=
371 Dtemp * (dot(fs, fpsp) - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf * divfp);
372
373 if (NeedsKIntegral) {
374 DK[k][l].second += dot(fs, cross(Ktemp, (cvec)fpsp));
375 }
376 }
377 }
378 }
379
380 if (NeedsSingSub) {
381 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fpvec[0], svec[i]);
382 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
383 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
384 double divfp(fp->RWGPreFactor());
385 ss.ChangeTriangleRWG(fp);
386 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
387 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
388 double divf(f->RWGPreFactor());
389 rvec fs(f->Evaluate(svec[i]));
390
391 DK[k][l].first +=
392 dA / (4. * PI) * (-1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf *
393 (ss.K1(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K1(1)) +
394 dot(fs, ss.K2(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K2(1)));
395
396 if (NeedsKLineIntegral) {
397 DK[k][l].second +=
398 dA / (4. * PI) *
399 dot(fs, cross((rvec)(f->FreeVertex() - fp->FreeVertex()),
400 ss.K3n(-1)) *
401 divfp / (-2.) -
402 k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
403 } else if (NeedsKIntegral) {
404 DK[k][l].second +=
405 dA / (4. * PI) * dot(fs, ss.K4(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
406 }
407 }
408 }
409 }
410 }
411
412 if (NeedsKLineIntegral) {
413 // Line integral for surface gradient of 1/R
414 // Note that triangle order is reversed
415 rvec n = cross((rvec)(rp[1] - rp[0]), (rvec)(rp[2] - rp[0]));
416 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
417 rvec &p1 = rp[i], &p2 = rp[(i + 1) % 3];
418 double L = sqrt(dot(p2 - p1, p2 - p1));
419
420 // Outward normal on edge;
421 rvec m = cross((rvec)(p2 - p1), n);
422 m = m / sqrt(dot(m, m));
423
424 // Line integral
425 for (int j = 0; j < gausslegendre::N17; j++) {
426 rvec s = p1 * gausslegendre::x17[j][0] + p2 * gausslegendre::x17[j][1];
427 double dL = L * gausslegendre::w17[j];
428
429 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fvec[0], s);
430 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
431 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
432 ss.ChangeTriangleRWG(f);
433 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
434 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
435 rvec pqm = cross((rvec)(f->FreeVertex() - fp->FreeVertex()), m);
436
437 DK[k][l].second +=
438 -dL / (4. * PI) * fp->RWGPreFactor() / 2. * dot(pqm, ss.K2(-1));
439 }
440 }
441 }
442 }
443 }
444
445 if (NeedsDanalytic) {
446 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
447 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
448 double divf(f->RWGPreFactor());
449 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
450 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
451 double divfp(fp->RWGPreFactor());
452 // Analytical 4D integral for (div f)(div f')/(4 pi r)
453 DK[k][l].first +=
454 -1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf * divfp / (4 * PI) * tPtr->getI1();
455 // Analytical 4D integral for f dot f'/(4 pi r)
456 // Note that f=fp and f!=fp need to be treated differently
457 if (f == fp) {
458 DK[k][l].first +=
459 divf * divfp / (16. * PI) * tPtr->getI2(f->FreeVertexPtr());
460 } else {
461 DK[k][l].first +=
462 divf * divfp / (16. * PI) *
463 tPtr->getI2(f->FreeVertexPtr(), fp->FreeVertexPtr());
464 }
465 }
466 }
467 }
468}
469
474void GreenFHom3D::SameTriDKG(
475 const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fvec, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
476 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<dcmplx, dcmplx>>>& DK,
477 std::vector<std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>>& DKG) {
478 // Since DKG should be called only for different domains, we assume no need of
479 // singularity subtraction!
480
481 Triangle *tPtr = fvec[0]->TrianglePtr(), *tpPtr = fpvec[0]->TrianglePtr();
482 rvec r[3], rp[3];
483 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
484 r[i] = tPtr->Node(i);
485 rp[i] = tpPtr->Node(i);
486 }
487 double A = tPtr->Area(), Ap = tpPtr->Area();
488
489 int Ndunavant;
490 double(*xdunavant)[3];
491 double* wdunavant;
492 if (NeedsAccurate) {
493 Ndunavant = dunavant::N5;
494 xdunavant = dunavant::x5;
495 wdunavant = dunavant::w5;
496 } else {
497 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
498 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
499 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
500 }
501
502 std::vector<rvec> svec(Ndunavant), spvec(Ndunavant);
503 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
504 svec[i] = r[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + r[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
505 r[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
506 spvec[i] = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
507 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
508 }
509
510 std::tuple<dcmplx, cvec, cdyad> allG;
511 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
512 double dA = A * wdunavant[i];
513 for (int j = 0; j < Ndunavant; ++j) {
514 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[j];
515 allG = EvaluateAll(svec[i], spvec[j]);
516 std::get<0>(allG) *= dA * dAp;
517 std::get<1>(allG) *= dA * dAp;
518 std::get<2>(allG) *= dA * dAp;
519 for (int k = 0; k < (int)fvec.size(); ++k) {
520 RWGFun* f = fvec[k];
521 rvec fs(f->Evaluate(svec[i]));
522 double divf(f->RWGPreFactor());
523 for (int l = 0; l < (int)fpvec.size(); ++l) {
524 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[l];
525 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(spvec[j]));
526 double divfp(fp->RWGPreFactor());
527
528 DK[k][l].first += std::get<0>(allG) *
529 (dot(fs, fpsp) - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf * divfp);
530 DK[k][l].second += dot(fs, cross(std::get<1>(allG), (cvec)fpsp));
531 DKG[k][l].first += std::get<1>(allG) *
532 (dot(fs, fpsp) - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * divf * divfp);
533 DKG[k][l].second[0] +=
534 dot(fs, cross(std::get<2>(allG)[0], (cvec)fpsp));
535 DKG[k][l].second[1] +=
536 dot(fs, cross(std::get<2>(allG)[1], (cvec)fpsp));
537 DKG[k][l].second[2] +=
538 dot(fs, cross(std::get<2>(allG)[2], (cvec)fpsp));
539 }
540 }
541 }
542 }
543}
544
545//Compute delta and kappa vectors at an observation point for multiple RWGs on the same triangle.
546void GreenFHom3D::SameTriDeltaKappa(
547 rvec r, const std::vector<RWGFun*>& fpvec,
548 std::vector<std::pair<cvec, cvec>>& DeltaKappa) {
549 Triangle* Tp = fpvec[0]->TrianglePtr();
550 rvec rp[3];
551 for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
552 rp[i] = Tp->Node(i);
553 }
554 double Ap = Tp->Area(), perimp = Tp->Perimeter();
555 rvec Tc(Tp->Center());
556 double dist = sqrt(dot(r - Tc, r - Tc));
557 double kr = sqrt(norm(k_B)) * dist;
558 SingSub ss;
559
560 int Ndunavant;
561 double(*xdunavant)[3], *wdunavant;
562 if (NeedsAccurate) {
563 Ndunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N5;
564 xdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x5;
565 wdunavant = (dist < perimp) ? dunavant::w17 : dunavant::w5;
566 } else {
567 Ndunavant = dunavant::N1;
568 xdunavant = dunavant::x1;
569 wdunavant = dunavant::w1;
570 }
571
572 bool NeedsSingSub = (dist < perimp) || (kr < 0.2 * PI);
573 dcmplx (GreenFHom3D::*Dfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp) =
574 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3D::Smoothed : &GreenFHom3D::Evaluate;
575 cvec (GreenFHom3D::*Kfunction)(rvec r, rvec rp) =
576 NeedsSingSub ? &GreenFHom3D::GradientSmoothed : &GreenFHom3D::Gradient;
577
578 dcmplx Dtemp;
579 cvec Ktemp;
580 for (int i = 0; i < Ndunavant; ++i) {
581 rvec sp = rp[0] * xdunavant[i][0] + rp[1] * xdunavant[i][1] +
582 rp[2] * xdunavant[i][2];
583 double dAp = Ap * wdunavant[i];
584 Dtemp = dAp * (this->*Dfunction)(r, sp);
585 Ktemp = dAp * (this->*Kfunction)(r, sp);
586 for (int j = 0; j < (int)fpvec.size(); ++j) {
587 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[j];
588 rvec fpsp(fp->Evaluate(sp));
589 DeltaKappa[j].first +=
590 (fpsp * Dtemp - 1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() * Ktemp);
591 DeltaKappa[j].second += cross(Ktemp, (cvec)fpsp);
592 }
593 }
594
595 if (NeedsSingSub) {
596 ss.SetTriangleRWG(fpvec[0], r);
597 for (int j = 0; j < (int)fpvec.size(); ++j) {
598 RWGFun* fp = fpvec[j];
599 ss.ChangeTriangleRWG(fp);
600 DeltaKappa[j].first +=
601 1. / (4. * PI) * (-1. / (k_B * k_B) * fp->RWGPreFactor() *
602 (ss.K3(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K3(1)) +
603 (ss.K2(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K2(1)));
604 DeltaKappa[j].second +=
605 1. / (4. * PI) * (ss.K4(-1) - k_B * k_B / 2. * ss.K4(1));
606 }
607 }
608}
GreenFHom3D.h
3D scalar/dyadic Green's function in a homogeneous background.
